message:
chore: rustfmt cleanups across tantivy + gui + fuzz

Whitespace-only changes adopting the project rustfmt style:

- crates/frankenterm-core-tantivy/src/recorder_lexical_ingest.rs,
  recorder_lexical_schema.rs, tantivy_query.rs:
    Reorder test-mod `use` statements so `use crate::...` precedes
    `use frankenterm_core::...` (matches the alphabetical / std
    -> crate -> external -> sibling order rustfmt is configured
    to enforce in the workspace).

- crates/frankenterm-core-tantivy/src/tantivy_ingest.rs:
    Reflow long signatures and `match` arms in
    `AppendLogEventSource::from_storage`, `head_offset`,
    `IndexerConfig::data_path`, and `create_event_reader` so the
    return-type and pattern-binding lines stay under the
    configured max width.

- crates/frankenterm-gui/src/overlay/quickselect.rs:
    Collapse a single-call `merge_dirty_results(...)` invocation
    onto one line in `dirty_rect_both_empty_produces_empty_set`
    where rustfmt no longer wraps it.

- fuzz/fuzz_targets/pdu_try_read_chunked.rs:
    Reflow `io::Error::new(io::ErrorKind::WouldBlock, "...")` onto
    multiple lines per rustfmt's expected layout.

No logic, behavior, or public API changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
